title: zappania corymbosa
intro: Zappania corymbosa, also known as the Zappania bush or Coral Berry, is a flowering plant species native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Zappania corymbosa include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce swelling. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to support immune function, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Zappania corymbosa can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, typically made by steeping the leaves and berries in hot water, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
